description_full:
Given an integer array nums, return all the different possible non-decreasing subsequences of the given array with at least two elements. You may return the answer in any order.

 
Example 1:


Input: nums = [4,6,7,7]
Output: [[4,6],[4,6,7],[4,6,7,7],[4,7],[4,7,7],[6,7],[6,7,7],[7,7]]


Example 2:


Input: nums = [4,4,3,2,1]
Output: [[4,4]]


 
Constraints:


	1 <= nums.length <= 15
	-100 <= nums[i] <= 100
description: Given an integer array nums, return all the different possible non-decreasing subsequences of the given array with at least two elements. You may return the answer in any order.

subtasks.intent: Implement a backtracking algorithm to generate all unique non-decreasing subsequences of at least two elements.
